violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Gaskets of under counter (espresso) refrigerator are cracked/damaged.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Dust/debris build up at filter of soda dispenser ice machine. -Dust/residue at top of oven. -Food/debris in bottom oven sheet pan.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust/debris at walk in cooler fans. -Debris build up in floor drain at walk in cooler.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani Buckets found out of range (high) at 2258ppm Lactic Acid. *Dispenser appears to be dispensing product too strong and likely needs recalibrated.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Residue at floors below dish pit and dishwasher. -Dust/debris build up at walk in cooler fans.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
